reason: This tweet appears to be a personal reflection about relationships/opinions and contains no ISIS-related content or support. It roughly translates to discussing how people liked them for being genuine but now criticize them for not doing things they don't believe in.
original_post: كسبت نفسى اكتر ... انتو حبتونى ﻷنى مش بوشين لاكن دلوقتى بتقولو خسرت ﻷنى محبتش انفز حاجه مش نقتنع بيها !
